creator: kenrap@kennethraplee.com
text:
I started noticing these weird "can't re-use a leaf kstat.zfs.zroot.dataset" sysctl warnings as shown below, during a reboot from updating my CURRENT build to https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=5ab6ed93cd3680f8b69dd4d05823f4740a2bdef9.

This cause might be related to the most recent openzfs merge that's three commits behind what I'm using: https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=ce4dcb97ca433b2a2f03fbae957dae0ff16f6f51.

```
Trying to mount root from zfs:zroot/ROOT/current-default []...
```
